overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic urban environment (Cyberpunk 2077 style) showing a walk along a city sidewalk beneath distinctive red overhead transit structures. The player moves through a modern commercial district with dark geometric buildings, passing pedestrians and approaching an intersection in warm afternoon sunlight.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a street corner with a marked crosswalk, turning onto a wide concrete sidewalk beneath distinctive red overhead transit structures. The camera follows a pedestrian in a gray coat while another pedestrian with red hair walks alongside, moving through a futuristic urban corridor with dark modern buildings.

segments.scene_description: Walking steadily beneath the red overhead structures, the camera passes a prominent building entrance with wide white stairs and a parked black car. The environment remains consistently urban with concrete walkways, while pedestrians continue walking ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching urban intersection with traffic control signals

exiting the covered walkway section into the open intersection area

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches an open urban intersection with a red traffic light visible ahead. The red overhead structures recede to the left as the camera moves toward the crosswalk, passing a pedestrian signal box and approaching palm trees and modern buildings across the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a futuristic urban corridor that transitions from a sheltered walkway into an open city intersection. It begins at a street corner, turning onto a wide concrete sidewalk beneath distinctive red overhead transit structures while following pedestrians through a district of dark, modern buildings. As the camera moves steadily forward, the scene passes a prominent building entrance with wide white stairs and a parked black car. The environment then opens up as the red overhead structures recede to the left, shifting the perspective toward a wide intersection. Finally, the camera approaches a red traffic light and a pedestrian signal box, moving toward palm trees and modern architecture across the street.
